results.title: Coach Clarke boosts Scotland defence, Morocco unchanged from opener
Ottawa police sergeant charged in alleged road rage incident in Oakville
results.description: An Ottawa police staff sergeant has been charged with assault following an alleged road rage incident in Oakville, Ont., on Friday. Staff Sgt. Walt Lushman was off duty at the time.
